docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $782.50 FILED BY LAU, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-02-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY LAU, KENNETH AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, KENNETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT DEFENDANT WAS REQUIRED TO SEND HIM NOTICE BY POSTAL DELIVERY THAT HIS MILEAGE CREDIT WAS EXPIRING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
